chain.thought: Explanation: Counting records set outside the United States: Bobby Morrow (1, Melbourne, Australia); Manfred Germar (1, Wuppertal, Germany); Peter Radford (1, Wolverhampton, United Kingdom); Livio Berruti (2, Rome, Italy); Tommie Smith (1, Mexico City, Mexico); Donald Quarrie (1, Cali, Colombia). Livio Berruti has the most with 2.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The question asks which athlete set the most records in countries other than the United States. Counting non-U.S. locations per athlete:
- Bobby Morrow: 1 (Melbourne, Australia)
- Manfred Germar: 1 (Wuppertal, Germany)
- Peter Radford: 1 (Wolverhampton, United Kingdom)
- Livio Berruti: 2 (Rome, Italy, twice on September 3, 1960)
- Tommie Smith: 1 (Mexico City, Mexico)
- Donald Quarrie: 1 (Cali, Colombia)
All others are in the United States. Livio Berruti has the highest count with 2 non-U.S. records.
